scripts.deploy:prune: SLS_STAGE=$(if [ "$ACCESS" = 'prep' ]; then echo 'dev'; else echo "$ACCESS"; fi) && export COMMIT=$(npx sdk-environment get commit) && npx sls prune -n 7 --stage $SLS_STAGE
scripts.deploy:release: SLS_STAGE=$(if [ "$ACCESS" = 'prep' ]; then echo 'dev'; else echo "$ACCESS"; fi) && export COMMIT=$(npx sdk-environment get commit) && npm run build && sls deploy --verbose --stage $SLS_STAGE
scripts.deploy:send-notification:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "{\"text\":\"$([ -z $DEPLOYER_NAME ] && git config user.name || echo $DEPLOYER_NAME) has deployed $npm_package_name@v$npm_package_version:
https://github.com/@declapract{variable.organizationName}/$npm_package_name/tree/v$npm_package_version\"}" @declapract{variable.slackWebhookUrl}
scripts.deploy:prod: ACCESS=prod npm run deploy:release && npm run deploy:send-notification
scripts.deploy: if-env ACCESS=prod && npm run deploy:prod && exit 0 || if-env ACCESS=prep && npm run deploy:prep && exit 0 || echo '🛑 invalid ACCESS, must be prod or prep' && exit 1
